params.name: La Marseillaise
params.description:
On Jun 24, 1836 AD, La Marseillaise was officially completed at the Arc de Triomphe.
It is Francois Rude's masterpiece and one of the best-known as, respectively describing the Goddess of Liberty guiding people forward, and the warriors marching bravely for France. Through the symbolism of romanticism, the majestic momentum of the French army against the invaders was vividly displayed. The sculpture is not only an epic work celebrating the French Revolution, but also the pride of the French p …
